MASTER JURY TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-07-2024 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON OCT-21-2024 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NO APPEARANCE FOR SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF JESSICA FONTENOT. JOSE VEGA ZAMUDIO, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT DOMUS MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC. SHELBY KENNICK, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT DOMUS MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC. THE COURT ASKS DEFENDANTS IF THEY RECEIVE A PHONE CALL FROM PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS DID NOT RECEIVE A CALL FROM PLAINTIFF. MR. ZAMUDIO REQUESTS AN OSC RE DISMISSAL FOR FAILUE TO APPEAR. COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO 10/21/24 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 AND IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT APPEAR, THEN DEFENDANTS MAY MOVE FOR DISMISSAL. DEFENDANTS TO GIVE NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
